1797850.name: Goodlands
1797850.description:
A game about dinos digging up dinos.

Play as a paleontologist trying to revitalize a decrepit museum by filling it with beautiful fossils straight out the Cretaceous.

FEATURES:

- A cast of cute dinosaur (and other paleo) townsfolk

- Full character customization (species, color palette, etc.)

- Fossil cleaning mini game

- Discover 14 fully-realized vertebrate fossils

- Drive across a curated open world and explore environments inspired by real-world dig sites

- Uncover the geological history of the region by collecting invertebrate fossils

- Find hidden content and easter eggs!

Capsule artwork created by SunnyHallows
